summary: Iteration 27 — Horeca flow E2E test (backend + frontend). All 14 backend tests passed and all frontend critical paths (FlowSelector tile, 3-step wizard, Eijsink supplier modal, lease formula, Step 3 business case) verified.

backend: Eijsink POS Touchkassa lease = 83.22 — formula (3300+500)*0.0219 verified (PASS)
Lease formula validated for all 32 products (PASS)
No raw multiplier/margin keys exposed in /horeca/products (PASS)
GET /api/horeca/top5 returns 5 products sorted by revenue_per_m2 desc with lease_monthly field (PASS)
POST /api/horeca/calculate-revenue with products: full report shape, lease sum invariant (PASS)
POST /api/horeca/calculate-revenue with empty products: zeroed report, no crash (PASS)
GET /api/partners/profiles/eijsink: name, tagline, 3 top_producten, 6 usps, podcast Leisure Talk #21 with Jesse, trendwatcher_quote, stats, deelname (PASS)
frontend: FlowSelector shows 7 user-facing flow tiles + 1 grid container (8 data-testid='flow-*' total). flow-horeca tile present (PASS)
Click flow-horeca routes to HorecaWizard. horeca-wizard + horeca-step-1 visible (PASS)
Step 2: 32 horeca-add-* buttons present; 'Vanaf ... per maand' visible; no '0.0219'/'2.19%'/'2,19%' leak in DOM (PASS)
Click product Toevoegen: header updates to 'Vanaf €X per maand' (no raw multiplier shown) (PASS)

Click [data-testid='horeca-supplier-Eijsink'] opens SupplierProfile modal with: 'Jesse' mention, 'Leisure Talk #21' podcast, 'POS-systemen' tagline, stats 350+/35+/8.000+/4.7/5, podcast Beluister button, Richard Otten trendwatcher quote, top 3 products, USPs (PASS)

horeca-calc-revenue invokes /api/horeca/calculate-revenue and renders horeca-step-3 with lease 'Vanaf € 394 per maand', netto winst, jaarlijkse winst, Top performers (Heineken/Eijsink Bestelzuil/Eijsink POS), Aanbevelingen (Pub Games + Terras), and Alle producten table with per-row lease/mnd values (PASS)

critical_code_review_comments: horeca_engine.py is 800+ lines and embeds the full product catalogue inline; consider splitting HORECA_PRODUCTS / HORECA_SUPPLIERS into a JSON or seed file to keep engine logic <500 lines and ease future product additions.
calculate-revenue endpoint accepts a raw dict (no Pydantic model). Adding a request schema (HorecaCalculateRequest) would give 422 on malformed input instead of silently mapping to empty.

calc_lease_monthly() is duplicated conceptually with the FEC/Chalet flows. Consider extracting to a shared lease_utils module to guarantee a single source of truth for the deterministic formula across all flows.

Modal close: Escape key did not close SupplierProfile during automated test (overlay intercepted pointer events). Verify that the modal supports ESC-to-close for keyboard accessibility (a11y nice-to-have, not blocking).
seed_data_creation: None. Used in-memory HORECA_PRODUCTS list shipped in horeca_engine.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Horeca flow is fully working. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration27_horeca.py (re-runnable). Lease formula (investment + max(investment*0.10, 500)) * 0.0219 verified end-to-end. Eijsink demo to Jesse should work — modal renders podcast, trendwatcher quote, stats, top products, USPs. No frontend leak of raw multiplier or margin in any of the 3 steps. ESC-key on SupplierProfile overlay does not close it; if main agent wants keyboard a11y, add ESC handler — not blocking.
